name: French Meringue Strips
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Pillsbury Best All Purpose Flour, sifted
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, sift together flour, sugar, and salt.
3. Cut in butter until particles are fine.
4. In a measuring cup, combine beaten egg yolks with enough water to equal 1/3 cup.
5. Gradually sprinkle the yolk mixture over the flour mixture, stirring with a fork until the dough is moist enough to hold together.
6. Form the dough into a ball and chill while preparing the meringue.
7. To make the meringue, beat egg whites with 1/8 teaspoon French's Cream of Tartar until soft mounds form.
8. Gradually add confectioners' sugar, continuing to beat until stiff peaks form.
9. Stir in vanilla extract.
10. Roll out dough on a floured surface to a rectangle measuring approximately 20 x 15 inches.
11. Spread the meringue evenly over the dough.
12. Sprinkle the cinnamon and chopped almonds over the meringue.
13. Cut into strips measuring 3 x 1 inch.
14. Place the strips on ungreased baking sheets.
15. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F/175°C) for 10 to 15 minutes, or until delicately browned.
For use with Pillsbury's Best Self-Rising Flour, omit salt; decrease baking time to 8 to 10 minutes.
Dough and Meringue may be covered tightly and stored in the refrigerator up to 4 days.
